mapper.sql: SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM courses c JOIN teachers t ON t.id = c.teacher_id
mapper.select: WHERE c.teacher_id=#{teacherId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courses(course_code, course_name, credit, teacher_id, semester, usual_weight, final_weight) VALUES(#{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{credit}, #{teacherId}, #{semester}, COALESCE(#{usualWeight}, 30), COALESCE(#{finalWeight}, 70))
mapper.update: UPDATE courses SET course_code=#{courseCode}, course_name=#{courseName}, credit=#{credit}, teacher_id=#{teacherId}, semester=#{semester}, usual_weight=COALESCE(#{usualWeight}, usual_weight), final_weight=COALESCE(#{finalWeight}, final_weight) WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE courses SET usual_weight=#{usualWeight}, final_weight=#{finalWeight} WHERE id=#{id}
